prompt: A crane unloads containers onto AGV1 and AGV2. A drone supervises from above, and a forklift transports the containers to storage. Both AGVs wait until crane signals unloading complete. Forklift starts after any AGV reaches the transfer zone. Drone must maintain 20 m distance from crane at all times. Eventually, all containers must be in storage.
constraints: AGV1 and AGV2 wait until CraneBot signals unloading complete
Forklift starts only after at least one AGV reaches transfer zone
DroneSupervisor maintains at least 20 m distance from CraneBot
Eventually all containers reach storage area

results.constraint: AGV1 and AGV2 wait until CraneBot signals unloading complete

generation.raw_text:
{
    "query": "CraneBot.unloading_complete --> AGV1.waiting_for_unload && AGV2.waiting_for_unload",
    "explanation": "This UPPAAL query represents the sequential workflow where AGV1 and AGV2 wait until CraneBot signals unloading complete. The operator '-->' is used to model the eventual behavior of AGVs waiting after the unloading signal.",
    "confidence": 0.85,
    "pattern_used": "sequential_workflow",
    "operator_used": ["-->"]
}

uppaal_result.explanation: This UPPAAL query represents the sequential workflow where AGV1 and AGV2 wait until CraneBot signals unloading complete. The operator '-->' is used to model the eventual behavior of AGVs waiting after the unloading signal.

results.constraint: DroneSupervisor maintains at least 20 m distance from CraneBot

generation.raw_text:
{
    "query": "A[] (DroneSupervisor.distance_from_CraneBot < 20 imply DroneSupervisor.move_away_from_CraneBot)",
    "explanation": "This query enforces that if the distance between DroneSupervisor and CraneBot is less than 20 meters, then DroneSupervisor must immediately take action to move away. This ensures safety by maintaining a minimum distance as specified.",
    "confidence": 0.85,
    "pattern_used": "safety_immediate_response",
    "operator_used": ["imply"]
}
